participant_coverage_denominator: all participants with at least one evaluable primary-method window
released_window_mae_role: descriptive conditional metric over proposed-release windows
released_participant_equal_mae_role: predeclared secondary endpoint conditional on participants with at least one proposed release
window_unsafe_upper95_role: naive descriptive binomial sensitivity only; repeated windows are not independent and this is not inferential
participant_unsafe_upper95_role: participant-level secondary endpoint conditional on release; one any-unsafe indicator per released participant
unsafe_participant_denominator: participants with at least one proposed release
